reviews.name: 감자
reviews.content:
S사이즈 착용 💙 몸무게 2.6kg / 허리둘레 31cm

쪼꼬미 감자가 S사이즈를 착용해보았어요 ~*
감자는 모량 뿜뿜 강아지입니당. 허리둘레를 꽉 쟀을 때 30cm 정도였는데요. 아무래도 모량이 많다보니까 타이트한 느낌이 있더라구요.
사이즈도 S사이즈의 맨 끝 경계에 걸쳐있다 보니까 모량이 많은 친구들은 기본 허리둘레에서 1~2cm정도 여유있게 사이즈를 선택하는 것이 좋을 것 같다는 생각이 들었답니다 ㅎㅎ
모량까지 여유롭게 잰 30cm 친구들은 S사이즈로 !
그 이상 친구들은 M으로 ~~ :)
불편함없이 잘 돌아다니고, 벨크로가 풀러지지도 않아서 너무 만족스러웠답니당.
reviews.content_en:
Size S worn 💙 Weight 2.6kg / Waist circumference 31cm

Our little Gamja tried on the S size! Gamja is a fluffy pup with lots of fur. When we measured the waist snugly, it was about 30cm, but with all that fur, it felt a bit tight.
Since Gamja is right at the edge of the S size range, I think dogs with lots of fur should choose a size with 1-2cm extra room from their base waist measurement ㅎㅎ
For dogs with 30cm waist (measured generously with fur), go with S!
For anything larger, go with M~~ :)
Gamja moves around without any discomfort, and the velcro doesn't come undone, so we're super satisfied!

reviews.name: 꾸루
reviews.content:
M사이즈 착용 ♥️ 몸무게 6.3kg / 허리둘레 35cm

핑크가 잘 어울리는 꾸루입니다 ㅎㅎ~ 허리둘레 35cm라서 M사이즈가 약간 타이트하게 맞더라구요 ! 벨크로가 거의 끝 부분에 붙어있었는데, 떼어지지는 않았어요 ! 혹시 활동량이 많거나 모량이 많은 친구들은 조금 더 넉넉하게 재서 치수를 확인하면 좋을 것 같아요 ! 여유를 줘서 넉넉하게 잰 35cm라면 M으로 추천합니다 ㅎㅎ! 아기 기저귀 같은 느낌이라 너무 귀여웠어요 👶
reviews.content_en:
Size M worn ♥️ Weight 6.3kg / Waist circumference 35cm

Kkuru looks adorable in pink ㅎㅎ~ With a 35cm waist, the M size fits a bit snug! The velcro was almost at the end of the strip, but it didn't come off! If your pup is extra active or has lots of fur, I'd suggest measuring a bit more generously to check the size! If you measure generously at 35cm, I'd recommend M ㅎㅎ! It looks like a baby diaper, so it's super cute 👶

reviews.name: 리치
reviews.content:
L사이즈 착용 💛 몸무게 7.2kg / 허리둘레 42cm

진짜 진짜 X 100 겁쟁이라 벨크로 소리 때문에
매너벨트는 꿈도 못 꾸는 강아지였는데요 !
애견동반 카페나 운동장, 스타필드 같이 실내 동반 장소를 자주 다니다 보니
매너벨트가 꼭 필요한 상황이 많더라구요 🥺
소프트 허그 매너벨트는 탈착을 하는지 모를 정도로 하나도 소리가 안 나요 !!!
옷 입히고 벗기는 것보다 쉬운 제품인 ㅎㅎㅎ
리치랑 비슷한 몸무게(7.2kg)와 허리둘레(42cm)인 친구들은
L사이즈 편하게 착용 가능합니다 🙌
reviews.content_en:
Size L worn 💛 Weight 7.2kg / Waist circumference 42cm

Really, REALLY a scaredy-cat (times 100), so belly bands were completely out of the question because of the velcro sound!
But since we visit dog-friendly cafes, dog parks, and indoor venues like STARFIELD so often,
I found we really needed a belly band 🥺
The Soft Hug belly band is so quiet you don't even notice you're putting it on and taking it off!!!
It's easier to use than putting on and taking off clothes ㅎㅎㅎ
Friends with similar weight to Richi (7.2kg) and waist circumference (42cm)
can wear size L comfortably 🙌

reviews.name: 테리
reviews.content:
M사이즈 착용 💙 몸무게 3.8kg / 허리둘레 34.5cm

매너벨트를 애용하는 테리입니다 ㅎㅎ 마킹방지를 위해 자주 매너벨트를 착용하는데요 !
다른 매너벨트는 착용하고 시간이 좀 지나면 돌아가있는 경우가 많았어요 ㅠㅠ
그래서 오줌이 새는,, 불상사가 일어났는데요,,!!
소프트 허그 매너벨트는 돌아감이 없어서 신기했습니다 !!
그리고 견체 맞춤으로 설계된 패턴 때문인지 밑 부분이 말리는 현상도 없어서 너무 좋았어요 ❤️
무소음 벨크로는 말해뭐해,,,,,,👍👍👍 강추입니다 !!
reviews.content_en:
Size M worn 💙 Weight 3.8kg / Waist circumference 34.5cm

Terry is a regular belly band user ㅎㅎ I wear belly bands frequently to prevent marking!
With other belly bands, after some time has passed, they often shift out of place ㅠㅠ
So there have been unfortunate incidents of leaks,, !!
I was amazed that the Soft Hug belly band doesn't shift at all!!
And because of the pattern designed specifically for dogs' bodies, there's no curling at the bottom either, so it's amazing ❤️
The silent velcro is... well, no words needed,,,👍👍👍 Highly recommended!!

reviews.name: 복실
reviews.content:
L사이즈 착용 💙 몸무게 9kg / 허리둘레 39cm

복실이는 L사이즈 아주 편하게 잘 맞았어요 ^-^*
찍찍이 소리를 진짜 무서워하는데, 무소음이라는 말이 맞더라구요......!!
벨크로가 아니라 그냥 부드러운 면 재질처럼 느껴졌습니다 ~~!
또 저는 강아지 피부에 직접 닿고, 장기간 착용하는 제품이다보니 재질도 중요하게 생각하는데요
바이어스랑 안감 부분은 오가닉 원단이라서 마음에 쏙 들었습니다🍀
reviews.content_en:
Size L worn 💙 Weight 9kg / Waist circumference 39cm

Bokssil fits the L size super comfortably ^-^*
She's really scared of the velcro sound, and the "silent" claim is true!!!
Instead of velcro, it just feels like soft cotton fabric ~~!
Also, since this is a product that touches my dog's skin directly and is worn for long periods, I think quality of material is important
I absolutely loved that the bias tape and lining are made from organic fabric 🍀

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
#체험단 매너벨트 필요한 곳들이 있어 다른 브랜드 제품을 사용하고있었는데 바잇미 소프트 허그 무소음 매너벨트는 재질도 부들부들 착용감도 너무 편해보이고 무소음 벨크로라서 착탈의 시 아이들이 놀라거나 털이 낄 걱정을 하지않아서 너무 좋더라구요! 유치원을 다니는 아이라 안쪽에 네임택까지 있어서 잃어버릴 일 없이 사용하기 너무 좋을 것 같아요! 세탁도 편하니 관리 걱정도 노노! 얼른 애카 놀러가야겠어요🤭💗
체중 7.8kg 목둘레 27cm 가슴둘레 43cm 등길이 39cm
reviews.content_en:
#Review team I was using another brand's product because belly bands were needed in certain places, but BITE ME Soft Hug silent belly band has such soft material and comfortable wear, plus the silent velcro means I don't have to worry about the kids being startled or fur getting caught when putting it on and taking it off, so it's amazing! Since my child goes to kindergarten, there's even a name tag on the inside so we won't lose it, and it's super convenient to use! Washing is easy too, so no worries about maintenance! Gotta take her to the pup cafe soon 🤭💗
Weight 7.8kg / Neck circumference 27cm / Chest circumference 43cm / Back length 39cm

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
L 사이즈 착용 💙 6.5kg / 허리둘레 36cm

반려견 동반 가능한 장소에 방문시에 꼭 매너벨트를 챙겨가고 있어요! 마킹이 잦은 아이라 아무래도 매너벨트를 자주 착용하게 되는데 아무래도 일회용은 재질이 좋지않아서 피부와 마찰되는 부분이 붉어지거나 가려워하는 경우도 많더라구요 바잇미 소프트 허그 무소음 매너벨트는 오가닉 원단이라 이 부분에 대한 걱정이 줄어들었어요! 그리고 타사 매너벨트의 벨크로와 달리 착용시에 소음이 하나도 발생하지 않아서 강아지들도 놀라거나 스트레스 받을 일이 전혀 없을 거 같아요 ㅎㅎ 접착력도 떨어질 걱정할 필요 없을만큼 강력하구요 어떤 소재로 만들어진건지 너무 신기해요 너무 만족🫶🏻 #체험단
reviews.content_en:
Size L worn 💙 6.5kg / Waist circumference 36cm

I always bring a belly band when visiting places where dogs are allowed! Since my pup marks frequently, I end up wearing the belly band often, and disposable ones have poor quality material, so the area where it rubs against skin often gets red and itchy. BITE ME Soft Hug silent belly band uses organic fabric, so my worries about this have decreased! And unlike other brands' velcro, there's absolutely no noise when putting it on, so dogs won't get startled or stressed at all ㅎㅎ The adhesive is also strong enough that you don't need to worry about it coming loose. I'm so curious what material it's made from, it's amazing! Very satisfied 🫶🏻 #Review team

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
현재 약 6.4kg, 허리둘레 32~33cm 정도 되는 푸들한테 m사이즈 잘 맞습니닷
핑크색을 좋아해서 핑크로 샀는데 하트뿅뿅 무늬까지 더해져서 넘 귀엽구 좋아요...
그리고~~ 벨크로 뜯는 소리 안좋아하는데 당연하게도 소리가 안나서 더더 좋았습니다...
부드럽고 귀엽고 조용하니 완전 100점이에요...^^
애카다닐때 유용하게 잘 쓸 것 같아요 감사합니다
reviews.content_en:
Currently weighs about 6.4kg with waist circumference of 32-33cm, and the M size fits the poodle perfectly
I wanted pink so I got pink, and with the heart pattern on top it's super cute and I love it...
And~~ I don't like the velcro tearing sound, and as expected there's no sound which is even better...
Soft, cute, and quiet - a perfect 100 points...^^
I think it'll be really useful when taking her to the puppy cafe, thank you

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 사용해보니 조금 커서 M으로 교환했어요. 꽉 붙여매야 몸에서 안흘러내리네요. 벨크로 부분이 어떻게 만든건지 붙이고 떼는 소리가 하나도 안나는데 접착력도 좋네요. 천도 부드러워서 아이 피부에도 좋을 것 같아요. 기저귀는 채워두면 엄청 불편해하더니 이건 얌전히 잘 차고 있네요. 강아지가 배변실수가 너무 잦아서 외출하거나 다른 장소에 이동해야 할 때마다 고생이었는데 이제 마음이 좀 편하네요. 열심히 써보려고요~
reviews.content_en: After trying it, it was a bit big so I exchanged it for M. It needs to be fastened tight or it'll slip off. I don't know how the velcro is made, but there's absolutely no sound when attaching and detaching it, and the adhesion is great. The fabric is also soft, so it seems good for my pup's skin. She really hates wearing diapers and gets very uncomfortable, but this one she wears quietly without fussing. My dog has accidents way too often, so it's been a hassle every time we go out or move locations, but now I feel much more at ease. I'll use it diligently~

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 소음안나는데 접착이 되는게 넘 싱기!!! 그리고 원단 촉감도 너무 부드럽고 시원해요 애기는 6키로고 사이즈도 잘맞아요! 무엇보다 시중에 다른 매너벨트는 두툼해서 여름엔 빨개지고 트러블땜에 항상 신경쓰이는데 이건 완전 가볍고 통기성 넘 좋을것 같아요 여름에 유용할듯❤️
reviews.content_en: No noise but it still adheres - that's amazing!!! And the fabric feels so soft and breathable too! My baby weighs 6kg and the size fits perfectly! Most importantly, other belly bands on the market are thick, so in summer they cause redness and skin troubles that I'm always worried about, but this one is super light and seems to have great breathability, so it'll be useful in summer ❤️

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 애카를 자주 가서 기저귀 자주 쓰는데 일회용은 사타구니 쪽 재질이 아무래도 단단하고 거칠어서 강쥐가 불편해 하더라고요 그래서 사줬는데 뒷발로 긁지도 않고 너무 잘 뛰어 놀아요~3.2kg 말티즈 S샀는데 낑기지 않고 잘 맞네요!
reviews.content_en: I go to the puppy cafe often and use belly bands frequently, but disposable ones have thick, rough material in the groin area that makes my pup uncomfortable. So I got this one, and my pup doesn't scratch with her back legs and plays so well~~ Got size S for my 3.2kg Maltese and it fits perfectly without squeezing!

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 일단 되게 부드럽고 바스락 소리가 안나니까 좋아요 유치원 다니면서 매너밸트 많이 하는데 여름에 쓰기도 좋을 것 같아요!!
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's really soft and there's no rustling sound, so that's great! I wear belly bands a lot while my pup goes to kindergarten, and it seems like it'll be good to use in summer too!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
유치원에서 사용하려고 구입했는데 진짜 무소음이네요! 
면도 오가닉? 같고 늘어짐도 타브랜드보다 적어서 좋아요ㅎㅎ 세일할 때 더 쟁이고 싶어요
reviews.content_en:
I bought it to use at kindergarten and it's really silent!
The fabric seems organic? and it stretches less than other brands, which is great ㅎㅎ I want to buy more when it goes on sale

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 아이기 스테로이드치료중인데 새벽에 소변실수를 하기시작해서 기저귀쓰다가 자는게 너무 불편해보이고 피부걱정되서 주문했어요 - 오가닉이라 가격대가 좀 있긴한데 피부가 약해져서 좋은거사야겟다 싶더라구요! 채워봤는데 거부감없이 잘해주네요:) 약간의 오염이 있는데 그냥 귀찮아서 쓸랍니당-
reviews.content_en: My pup is in steroid treatment and started having accidents at dawn, so wearing a diaper to sleep seemed really uncomfortable and I was worried about her skin - since it's organic the price is a bit higher, but I thought I should go with good quality for sensitive skin! She's wearing it without resistance :) There's a bit of some leakage, but I'm just too lazy to worry about it lol

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 재질도 좋고 찍찍이 소리 거의 안나고 부드럽게 떼어져서 좋아요. 너무 작은 아이라 일회용 기저귀는 두꺼워서 불편했는데 이건 얇고 부드러워 한결 편해 보여서 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The material is good, there's barely any velcro sound, and it comes off smoothly, which is great. My pup is so tiny that disposable diapers are too thick and uncomfortable, but this one is thin and soft so it's much better

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노랑이랑핑크 유치원에보내면서사용중인데너무좋아서하나더주문했어요.처음에출시됬을때그냥3개세트로했어야했는데,꼭지나서후회하더라구요.소음도없고부드럽고아주좋아요
reviews.content_en: I'm using yellow and pink for kindergarten and they're so good I ordered one more! When they first came out I should've just gone with a 3-pack set, but I regret not doing that since they sold out! No noise, soft, and just really great

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
완전 부들부들하고 가볍고 좋아요.
애견카페 가면 기저귀를 한개 밖에 안 줘서 늘 보솜이 기저귀 3-4개 갖고 가는데 부피가 커서 짐이 뚱뚱해졌는데, 이제 멋지게 이 기저귀와 리필만 산뜻하게 갖고가야겠어요!!!
reviews.content_en:
Super soft and light and great.
When I go to a dog cafe, they only give one diaper, so Bossom used to carry 3-4 diapers and the bag got bulky, but now I can just neatly carry this diaper and refills!!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 어작 언써봤는데 소재도 좋고 부드러워요
reviews.content_en: Tried it out and the material is good and soft

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 잘맞네요~~찍찍이소리않나서 스트레스없어좋구여~
reviews.content_en: Fits well~~ no velcro sound so it's stress-free and great~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
사이즈랑 택때문에 좀 기분이 별로였지만 제품은 너무 만족스러워요^^
허리가 얇은 애기들은 무조건 s사세요 ㅠ 비숑치고 얇은허리 아니 정상체중인데 맞지않아서 똑딱이 달아줬아요 ㅎ..
reviews.content_en:
I wasn't super happy about the size and tag, but I'm very satisfied with the product itself ^^
If your pup has a thin waist, definitely get size S ㅠ Even though our Bichon has a normal weight and thin waist, it didn't fit so we had to add a snap ㅎ..

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
전에 쓰던게 사이즈 어중간해서 작은 사이즈로 다시 샀는데 작아서 3kg 말티 친구 줬어요~ 
딱 맞다네요
5kg 저희 비숑아이 M사이즈 딱 맞아요
reviews.content_en:
I was using a different one that was an awkward size so I bought a smaller size again, and it was too small so I gave it to my 3kg Maltese friend~
It fits perfectly
Our 5kg Bichon baby fits M size perfectly

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저번에 옐로우 하나 사보고 좋아서 깔별로 구매했어요!
reviews.content_en: I bought one yellow one before and liked it so much I bought multiple colors!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 울아이가ㅡ넘 좋아하요 ^^
reviews.content_en: My baby really loves it ^^

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 소리안나는게 너무 신기해요. 거부감 없이 착용가능합니다
reviews.content_en: The fact that there's no sound is so amazing. Can be worn without any resistance

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 진짜로 소리는 안나요ㅈ부드럽게 붙네요 좋아요
reviews.content_en: There's really no sound and it sticks softly. I like it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 7.1키로 딱맞아요 좋아요
reviews.content_en: 7.1kg fits perfectly! I like it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 무소음 매너벨트 좋네요~
reviews.content_en: Silent belly band is great~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 조금 크지만 부드럽고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: A bit big but soft and nice

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 우리 강아지 입혀보니 너무 편하게 사용할것 같아요
reviews.content_en: Put it on my dog and it seems like it'll be super comfortable to use

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 소재가 좋아보여요. 유용히 잘 쓸께요. ^^
reviews.content_en: The material looks good. I'll use it well. ^^

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 가볍고 부드럽습니다~~
reviews.content_en: Light and soft~~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 사이즈 교환 문제 없이 잘 해주셨습니다. 감사합니다.
reviews.content_en: The size exchange was handled smoothly with no issues. Thank you.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 혹시몰라서 구매해봤어요 아직 안써봤어요
reviews.content_en: I bought it just in case, but I haven't used it yet.
